description: Live openmax.com sends id-type fields as JSON numbers (e.g. messageId 1784124726965, senderId). The canonical InboundMessage/wake-request contract declares them as strings, and schema-exact adapters (e.g. a /wake gate) reject numbers. The SDK must canonicalize numeric ids to strings at the ingestion boundary. Regression for the first contract drift found on real hardware — prior fixtures were all-string, so this class of bug was never exercised.
